VUB–Leeds Algebra School (2026)

8–12 June 2026 • Brussels, Belgium

Organised within the topYB International Joint Research Group (IJRG).

Organisers

Local organising committee and scientific coordination (details may be updated).

Scientific coordination

Code of Conduct contact

For any Code of Conduct concerns during the event, contact the scientific coordinators listed above. Additional contacts can be added here if preferred.
